==Legend==
{|class=wikitable
!Type
!Color Assignment
|-
|Event
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|
|-
|Snail Battle
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|
|-
|Reward
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|
|-
|Mine Pit
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|
|}

==Tiles==
{| class="wikitable"
!rowspan=2;|Tile
!colspan=3; |First Encounter
!colspan=2; |Second Encounter
!rowspan=2;|Notes
|-
!Name
!Troop RUSH required Power
!Reward
!Name
!Reward
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|1
| Domain Butler
| 7.3M
| T1 Thundos Medal +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|2
| Black Pawn
| 7.35M
| T1 Thundos Light +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|3
| Black Pawn
| 7.47M
| T1 Thundos Core +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|4
| Black Pawn
| 7.59M
| T1 Thundos Medal +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|5
| Black Bishop
| 7.96M
| T1 Thundos medal +3
| Chess Knowledge Quiz
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Lewis Chessmen|blue}} +10
| Answers: B, A, B, C, A
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|6
| Black Knight
| 7.71M
| T1 Thundos Light +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|7
| Black Knight
| 7.83M
| T1 Thundos Core +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|8
| Black Rook
| 8.34M
| T1 Thundos Medal +4
| Locked Chess Box
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}} +5<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Lightning Rune}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
| {{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}}: 4113
|-
|style="background-color:var(--blue-bg)"|9
| Black King
| 8.08M
| T1 Thundos Light +3
| King's Diary
| {{RewardIconWithLink|CIV Master Scroll|orange}} +40
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|10
| White Pawn
| 8.21M
| T1 Thundos Core +3
| [[#Snail Fights|White Queen]]
| {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +1,500
| After beating the first fight, a [[#Shops|Shop]] will open up. Buying all items in the shop will trigger the second fight. 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|11
| Black Queen
| 8.54M
| T1 Thundos Light +4
| [[#Snail Fights|Black Queen]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|12
| Miner
| 7.81M
| T1 Thundos Core +4
| [[#Mines|Lightning Mine]]
| 
| See linked table for mine requirements and rewards
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|13
| White Piece
| 7.94M
| T1 Thundos Medal +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|14
| White Piece
| 8.06M
| T1 Thundos Light +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|15
| Spirit of Fujiwara
| 8.19M
| T1 Thundos Core +4
| Discuss Go Skills
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Soul Chest}} +100
| Answers: C, B, B, A, B 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|16
| White Piece
| 8.58M
| T1 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|17
| Go Elder
| 8.80M
| T1 Thundos Medal +4
| [[#Snail Fights|Go Elder with Axe]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +100<br>{{RewardIconWithText|8h Soul Red|red}} (Soul of Go Elder)
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|18
| White Piece
| 8.45M
| T1 Thundos Light +4
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|19
| BetaGo Pro
| 8.95M
| T1 Thundos Medal +4
| [[#Snail Fights|From Go to Brawl]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|BetaGo|purple}} +20 Fragments
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|20
| Miner
| 8.18M
| T1 Thundos Light +4
| [[#Mines|Lightning Mine]]
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|21
| Black Chariot
| 8.27M
| T1 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|22
| Red Cannon
| 8.63M
| T1 Thundos Medal +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|23
| Red Advisor
| 8.72M
| T1 Thundos Light +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|24
| Black Cannon
| 8.36M
| T1 Thundos Medal +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|25
| Horse
| 8.81M
| T1 Thundos Core +5
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|26
| Red General
| 9.53M
| T2 Thundos Light +3
| [[#Snail Fights|Crushed Worm]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +50<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} +5k
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|27
| Black Advisor
| 8.45M
| T1 Thundos Light +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|28
| Horse
| 8.54M
| T1 Thundos Core +5
|
|
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|29
| Red Elephant
| 9.36M
| T2 Thundos Core +3
| Learn Chinese Chess Skills
| {{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Purple|CIV|Purple}} +3
| Answers: B, A, C, B, A
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|30
| Red Advisor
| 9.45M
| T2 Thundos Medal +3
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|31
| Black General
| 9.39M
| T1 Thundos Medal +5
| [[#Snail Fights|Role Model]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +50<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} +5k
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|32
| Black Elephant
| 8.99M
| T1 Thundos Light +5
| [[#Snail Fights|The Elephant Lover]]
| |{{RewardIconWithLink|Elephant's Meat, +10|black|Consumables}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest}} +100
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|33
| Black Cannon
| 9.55M
| T2 Thundos Light +3
|
|
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|34
| Black Advisor
| 9.08M
| T1 Thundos Core +5
| 
| 
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|35
| Red Cannon
| 9.17M
| T1 Thundos Medal +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|36
| Soldier
| 9.82M
| T2 Thundos Core +3
| [[#Snail Fights|Soldier across the River]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|37
| Miner
| 8.98M
| T2 Thundos Medal +4
| [[#Mines|Lightning Mine]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +800<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Lightning Rune}} +5<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|38
| Cruiser
| 9.11M
| T2 Thundos Light +4 
| 
|
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|39
| Destroyer
| 9.16M
| T2 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|40
| Nuclear Submarine 
| 9.34M
| T2 Thundos Light +4
| Abandoned Submarine 
| Display relic: {{RewardIconWithLink|AH602|orange}}
| ???
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|41
| Destroyer
| 9.30M
| T2 Thundos Medal +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|rowspan="3" style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|42
| Wave 1 
| 9.72M
| T2 Thundos Core +4
|rowspan="3"| [[#Snail Fights| Assault Aircraft Carrier]]
|rowspan="3"| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|rowspan="3"|
|-
| Wave 2
| 9.86M
| T2 Thundos Medal +4
|-
| Wave 3
| 10.01M
| T2 Thundos Light +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|43
| Destroyer
| 9.53M
| T2 Thundos Medal +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|44
| Torpedo Ship
| 9.48M
| T2 Thundos Core +4
| Naval Battle Knowledge Quiz
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest}} +100
| Answers: C, B, B, A, C, A
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|45
| Destroyer 
| 10.44M
| T2 Thundos Light +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|46
| Cruiser
| 10.15M
| T2 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|47
| Battleship
| 9.67M
| T2 Thundos Medal +4
| [[#Snail Fights|End of the Battleship]]
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell}} +3k
|
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|48
| Cruiser
| 10.3M
| T2 Thundos Medal +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|49
| Super Ghost Ship
| 10.59M
| T2 Thundos Core +5
| [[#Snail Fights|General Challenge]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Ghost Ship Figurehead}}
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|50
| Miner 
| 9.67M
| T2 Thundos Medal +5
| [[#Mines|Lightning Mine]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +800<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +600<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Lightning Rune}} +5
| 
|-
|rowspan="2" style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|51
| Keima
| 9.82M
| T2 Thundos Light +5
|rowspan="2"|
|rowspan="2"| 
|rowspan="2"|
|-
| O
| 9.96M
| T2 Thundos Core +5
|-
|rowspan="2" style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|52
| Hyosha
| 10.01M
| T3 Thundos Medal +3
|rowspan="2"|
|rowspan="2"| 
|rowspan="2"| 
|-
| S
| 10.16M
| T3 Thundos Light +3
|-
|rowspan="2" style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|53
| Hyosha
| 10.2M
| T3 Thundos Core +3
|rowspan="2"|
|rowspan="2"| 
|rowspan="2"| 
|-
| S
| 10.35M
| T3 Thundos Badge +3
|-
|rowspan="2" style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|54
| Keima
| 10.7M
| T3 Thundos Badge +4
|rowspan="2"|
|rowspan="2"| 
|rowspan="2"| 
|-
| O
| 10.85M
| T3 Thundos Light +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|55
| Ginsho
| 10.4M
| T3 Thundos Light +3
| [[#Snail Fights|Confrontation]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} +300
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|56
| Kinsho
| 10.55M
| T3 Thundos Core +3
| Shogi Knowledge Quiz
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Wish Coin|orange}} +2
| Answers: C, A, B, B, A
|-
|rowspan="2" style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|57
| Hisha
| 11.1M
| T3 Thundos Core +4
|rowspan="2"|[[#Snail Fights|The Last Dragon King]] 
|rowspan="2"|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest|orange}} +100
|rowspan="2"| 
|-
| Dragon King
| 11.25M
| T3 Thundos Badge +4
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|58
| Miner
| 10.28M
| T3 Thundos Light +4
| [[#Mines|Lightning Mine]]
| {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}} +21.6k<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +960<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Lightning Rune}} +6
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|59
| White Aircraft
| 10.43M
| T3 Thundos Core +4
| Fallen Aircraft
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Super Mutant Biceps|orange}}
| Give {{RewardIconWithText|Anti-Gachi Jet Oil}} from Tile 71
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|60
| Red Wingman
| 10.58M
| T3 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|61
| Red Leader
| 11.71M
| T3 Thundos Core +5
| [[#Snail Fights|Dogfight]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Abs|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}}
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|62
| Red Wingman
| 10.73M
| T3 Thundos Light +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|63
| Blue Leader
| 11.76M
| T3 Thundos +5
| [[#Snail Fights|Dogfight]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Abs|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T2|blue}}
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|64
| Blue Wingman
| 10.88M
| T3 Thundos +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|65
| Green Wingman
| 10.56M
| T3 Thundos Light +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|66
| Blue Wingman
| 11.04M
| T3 Thundos Medal +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|67
| Green Wingman
| 10.71M
| T3 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|68
| Green Leader
| 11.81M
| T3 Thundos Core +5
| [[#Snail Fights|Dogfight]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Abs|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}}
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|69
| Yellow Wingman
| 10.86M
| T3 Thundos badge +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|70
| Yellow Wingman
| 11.02M
| T3 Thundos Light +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|71
| Air Traffic Controller
| 12.13M
| T4 Thundos Medal +3
| [[#Snail Fights|Capture Air Traffic Controller]]
| {{RewardIconWithText|Password Note}} (Tile 8)<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Anti-Gachi Jet Oil}} (Tile 59)<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell}} +6k
| 7 Floor Battle Tower
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|72
| Yellow Leader
| 11.86M
| T3 Thundos Core +5
| Aeronautical Knowledge Quiz 
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Flyer I|blue}} +10<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|TECH Master Scroll, +40|orange}}
| Answers: B, C, C, A, B, C
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|73
| Planet Destroyer
| 12.18M
| T4 Thundos Light +3
| [[#Snail Fights|Match of Muscles]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|74
| Miner
| 11.02M
| T4 Thundos Core +3
| [[#Mines|Lightning Mine]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +960<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket|orange}} +20<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Lightning Rune}} +6
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|75
| Infantry
| 11.07M
| T4 Thundos Medal +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|76
| Infantry
| 11.12M
| T4 Thundos Light +3
| 
|
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|77
| Infantry
| 11.27M
| T4 Thundos Core +3
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|78
| Sniper
| 11.43M
| T4 Thundos Medal +4
| [[#Snail Fights|Exposed Sniper]]
| {{RewardIconWithText|Green Coating|green}} +100
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|79
| Infantry
| 11.59M
| T4 Thundos Light +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|80
| Infantry
| 11.75M
| T4 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|81
| Military Police
| 11.92M
| T4 Thundos Medal +4
| Restricted Military Area
| ???
| Display [[Medal of Honor#Mirage: Bald Eagle's Claw|Eisenhower]] Avatar (6 Star Medal of Honor Mirage)
|-
|style="background-color:var(--yellow-bg)"|82
| Convoy
| 12.08M
| T4 Thundos Light +4
| [[#Shops|Shop]]
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|83
| Infantry
| 12.81M
| T4 Thundos Core +4
| [[#Snail Fights|Energy Palms]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Gear RF|orange}} +5
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|84
| Ground Mecha
| 12.64M
| T4 Thundos Medal +4
| [[#Snail Fights|Showdown]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--green-bg)"|85
| Miner
| 11.53M
| T4 Thundos Light +4
| [[#Mines|Lightning Mine]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +1200<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Lightning Rune}} +8<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|86
| Domain Butler
| 11.58M
| T4 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|87
| Koryeon Power Tower
| 11.74M
| T4 Thundos Medal +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|88
| Yamato Power Tower
| 11.91M
| T4 Thundos Light +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|89
| Cathay Power Tower
| 12.07M
| T4 Thundos Core +4
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|90
| Murika Power Tower
| 12.24M
| T4 Thundos Medal +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|91
| Britland Power Tower
| 12.40M
| T4 Thundos Light +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|92
| Kemet Power Tower
| 12.57M
| T4 Thundos Core +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--?-bg)"|93
| Hellenic Power Tower
| 12.74M
| T4 Thundos Medal +5
| 
| 
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|94
| Bharata Power Tower
| 12.91M
| T4 Thundos Medal +5
| [[#Snail Fights|End of the Butler]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Rubber Suit|green}}
| 
|-
|style="background-color:var(--red-bg)"|95
| Thundos
| 13.2M
| T4 Thundos Core +5
| [[#Snail Fights|Thundos' Broken Helmet]]
| {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Thundos' Head|green}}
| Make sure to activate and upgrade the {{RewardIconWithLink|Rubber Suit|green}} relic prior to fighting.<br>Speaking to MBoard after beating Thundos rewards Demon Chest +50.
|-
|}

== Snail Fights ==
<tabber>
|-|General=
{| class="wikitable"
!Name !!Tile !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!RUSH !!Special Stats !!Rewards
|-
|White Queen
|10
|74,235
|49,490
|1,785,448
|AFFCT 92,600
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}} +1.5k
|-
|Black Queen
|11
|68,250
|45,500
|1,744,775
|AFFCT 88,675
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|-
|Go Elder
|17
|69,132
|46,088
|1,623,783
|AFFCT 89,260
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear Chest}} +100<br>{{RewardIconWithText|8h Soul Red|red}} (Soul of Go Elder)
|-
|BetaGo Pro
|19
|69,720
|46,480
|1,778,458
|AFFCT 89,650
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|BetaGo|purple}} +20 Fragments
|-
|Red General
|26
|70,602
|50,430
|1,608,810
|AFFCT 90,235
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +50<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} +5k
|-
|Black General
|31
|70,602
|50,430
|1,608,810
|AFFCT 90,235
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map}} +50<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Wood}} +5k
|-
|Prodigy Chong
|32
|71,660
|51,186
|1,685,858
|AFFCT 90,937
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Elephant's Meat|black|Consumables}} +10<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Organ Chest}} +100
|-
|Solider
|36
|72,072
|51,480
|1,770,616
|AFFCT 91,210
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|-
|Aircraft Carrier
|42
|72,072
|48,048
|1,745,034
|AFFCT 91,210
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|-
|Battleship
|47
|82,368
|49,280
|1,806,226
|AFFCT 92,400
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Cell}} +3k
|-
|Battleship
|49
|75,180
|46,540
|2,071,432
|AFFCT 93,200
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Ghost Ship Figurehead}}
|-
|Ginsho
|55
|75,495
|50,330
|1,952,889
|AFFCT 93,400
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Ancient Coin}} +300
|-
|Dragon King
|57
|76,125
|50,750
|2,002,623
|AFFCT 93,795
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Chest|orange}} +100
|-
|Red Leader
|61
|77,070
|51,380
|1,894,074
|AFFCT 94,380
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Abs|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}}
|-
|Blue Leader
|63
|78,015
|52,010
|1,913,700
|AFFCT 94,965
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Abs|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T2|blue}}
|-
|Green Leader
|68
|78,645
|52,430
|1,926,787
|AFFCT 95,355
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Golden Abs|blue}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|AR2-T1|green}}
|-
|Planet Destroyer
|73
|79,611
|53,074
|2,087,768
|AFFCT 95,940
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|-
|Sniper
|78
|80,588
|53,725
|1,951,467
|AFFCT 96,525
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithText|Green Coating|green}} +100
|-
|Hyakutaro
|83
|99,855
|66,570
|2,818,940
|AFFCT 107,400
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Gear RF|orange}} +5
|-
|Mecha Pilot
|84
|10,000
|10,000
|100,000
|AFFCT 49,850
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|-
|Bharata Power Tower
|94
|81,564
|54,376
|2,154,583
|AFFCT 97,110
|HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Incense, +1|orange}}<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Rubber Suit|green}}
|-
|Thundos
|95
|82,500
|55,000
|12,000,000
|AFFCT 97,850
|CRIT +100%<br> Crit DMG -50%<br> HIT +80<br> Paralysis RES +80%
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Thundos' Head|green}}
|-
|}
|-|Air Traffic Controller=
{|class="wikitable"
!Name !!ATK !!DEF !!HP !!RUSH !!Special Stats !!Rewards
|-
|rowspan="7"| Controller Guard
| 71,778
| 47,852
| 1,408,738
| AFFCT 91,015
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual}} +10
|-
| 73,290
| 48,860
| 1,526,231
| AFFCT 92,000
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual}} +13
|-
| 74,550
| 49,700
| 1,639,414
| AFFCT 92,800
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual}} +16
|-
| 76,125
| 50,750
| 1,762,309
| AFFCT 93,795
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual}} +20
|-
| 77,385
| 51,590
| 1,868,126
| AFFCT 94,575
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual}} +23
|-
| 78,645
| 52,430
| 1,976,192
| AFFCT 95,355
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual}} +26
|-
| 80,262
| 53,508
| 2,110,025
| AFFCT 96,330
| HIT +50, Paralysis RES +50%
| {{RewardIconWithText|Mecha Manual}} +30
|-
|}
</tabber>

== Shops ==
<tabber>
|-|Tile 10=
{| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost in {{RewardIconWithText|W-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +2|orange}}
|500
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Britland Treasure Map, +50}}
|300
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Zombie Cell, +1k}}
|150
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Wood, +1k}}
|150
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Stone, +1k}}
|150
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Stargazy Pie, +300|black|Consumables}}
|20
|}

|-|Tile 82={| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost in {{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Lottery Ticket, +3|orange}}
|40k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Tool Chest, +100}}
|40k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Matrix Motherboard}}<br>({{Retext|Can be used to upgrade [[Time Machine Mboard]]<br>enabling [[Control Panel]]|blue}})
|100k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|50k
|-
|{{RewardIconWonderFungusWithText|Orange, +1|HP|orange}} 
|20k
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Pyramid Card}}
|10k
|}
</tabber>

== Mines ==
{| class="wikitable"
! Tile !! Minions Required!! Rewards !! Time
|-
|12
|T6 x60
|Britland Treasure Map x720<br>Wormhole Refiner x600<br>Lightning Rune x4
|1d 20m
|-
|20
|T6 x60
|Britland Treasure Map x720<br>Lottery Ticket x16<br>Lightning Rune x4
|1d 20m
|-
|37
|T6 x60
|Britland Treasure Map x800<br>Lightning Rune x5<br>{{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|1d 3h 50m
|-
|50
|T6 x60
|Britland Treasure Map x800<br> Gear Chest x600<br> Lightning Rune x5
|1d 3h 50m
|-
|58
|T6 x60
|21.6k B-Tads<br> Britland Treasure Map x960<br> Lightning Rune x6
|1d 8h 20m
|-
|74
|T6 x60
|Britland Treasure Map x960<br> Lottery Ticket x20<br> Lightning Rune x6
|1d 7h 20m
|-
|85
|T6 x60
|Britland Treasure Map x1200<br> Lightning Rune x8<br> {{RewardIconWithLink|Thunder Moon}} +1
|1d 10h 45m
|-
|}

== Moon Shop ==

{| class="wikitable"
!Item !!Cost
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Thundos Medal|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Thundos Light|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|{{Retext|T3 Thundos Core|blue}} +50
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Wormhole Refiner, +400}}
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithLink|Dragon Orb, +1|orange}}
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|Clone Speedup, +2d}}
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad, +250k}}
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|{{RewardIconWithGearlink|orange|Material|Crystal of Will}}
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|-
|After Domain is 100%<br>{{RewardIconWithText|Britland Nebula Pack|orange}} ({{RewardIconWithLink|Quantum Gel, +1k}} and {{RewardIconWithLink|Singularity Crystal, +1|orange}})
|{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}{{RewardIcon|Thunder Moon}}
|}
[[Category:Britland Domain]]
